content: hey hayeong, can i get your help testing the search function again? I was wondeirng if you could help me lookup threadripper cpus that would pair well with the nvidia 6000 ada series gpu.

Sure thing. Let’s see what we can find. According to the AMD Ryzen Threadripper processors page, these CPUs are designed for high-performance workstations and offer the speed, performance, and flexibility you’d need for a powerful build. Here’s a quick overview of some Threadripper models that would pair well with the NVIDIA RTX 6000 Ada series GPU:
AMD Ryzen Threadripper 3995WX: 64-core behemoth with 128 threads, designed for heavy workloads like 3D rendering, video editing, and large-scale simulations.
AMD Ryzen Threadripper 5995WX: 64 cores and 128 threads, built on newer Zen 3 architecture, providing better single-thread performance and efficiency.
AMD Ryzen Threadripper 3975WX: 32 cores and 64 threads, still a powerhouse for a wide range of demanding tasks.
AMD Ryzen Threadripper 5975WX: 32 cores and 64 threads, also based on the Zen 3 architecture, offering improved performance over the previous generation.

For your specific build, the 64-core options like the Threadripper 3995WX or 5995WX would be excellent choices to pair with the NVIDIA RTX 6000 Ada series GPU. These CPUs should ensure there’s no bottleneck on the CPU side when running demanding applications.

Let me know if you need more detailed specs or have any other questions!
thanks hayeong this is real good feedback! Rest up i'll be back i have to go take this data and run tests with it to analyze it. But thank you so much for finding it and rest up so we can chat later.
